message:
Merge PR #2301: fix(rig): detect default branch from HEAD in bare clone

Bare repos lack refs/remotes/origin/* tracking branches, so RemoteDefaultBranch()
always returned empty. Now uses DefaultBranch() which reads HEAD (set to the
remote default branch during clone --bare). Includes test with a non-main
default branch.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2301
Author: pae23
